iteration_130_actions.description: Swarm iteration 130 - Fixed ollama-proxy golangci-lint formatter config + shellcheck SC2155, merged aa-dev-prod-watcher dependabot PR
actions_taken: ✅ Scanned all 193 repos for CI status
✅ Fixed ollama-proxy .golangci.yml: moved gofmt/goimports from linters.enable to formatters.enable (golangci-lint v2.12.2 classifies them as formatters)
✅ Fixed ollama-proxy .github/workflows/ci.yml: removed unnecessary 'export' on PATH assignment to fix shellcheck SC2155
✅ Pushed fix commit 395eed2 to ollama-proxy main
✅ Triggered @dependabot rebase on ollama-proxy PR #4 to pick up latest main fixes
✅ Merged aa-dev-prod-watcher PR #86 (Bump websocket-driver 0.7.4 → 0.7.5) - all checks passing
✅ Verified all 15 open issues have AI responses and labels (0 untriaged)
⏳ ollama-proxy CI + CICD runs in progress on main after fix
⚠️  dmzoneill/dmzoneill PR #3 still open - non-bot PR, needs owner review (Update Profile check failing)

fixes_applied.description: Moved gofmt/goimports to formatters section (golangci-lint v2.12.2) and fixed shellcheck SC2155
root_causes: golangci-lint v2.12.2 classifies gofmt and goimports as formatters, not linters - must be under formatters.enable
shellcheck SC2155: export PATH="$PATH:$(go env GOPATH)/bin" masks return value - removed unnecessary export

ollama-proxy.note: Fix commit 395eed2 pushed: gofmt/goimports moved to formatters + SC2155 fix. CI/CICD runs in progress. PR #4 rebase triggered.

Chuckbot.note: Dependabot cannot resolve js-yaml dependency conflict. CICD (push) passes.

gnome-extension-publisher.note: Dependabot updater error (pytest). No push CICD runs exist.
